items.name: Crab and Corn Bisque
items.desc: Creamy crab meat treasure served with crackers.

items.name: Seafood Gumbo
items.desc: Made from scratch shrimp & sausage gumbo served with crackers.

items.name: The Grill Salad
items.desc: Fresh tossed greens with grilled chicken, craisins, pineapple, parmesan cheese, and toasted almonds.

items.name: Mango Shrimp Salad
items.desc: Fresh greens with red onions, cherry tomatoes, boiled egg, parmesan cheese topped with mango BBQ shrimp.

items.name: Tender Salad
items.desc: Fresh greens with red onions, cherry tomatoes, boiled egg, parmesan cheese topped with crispy fried chicken.

items.name: Islamorada Chicken
items.desc: Grilled chicken breast marinated with island flavors. Served with Caribbean rice, steamed veggies, and grilled pineapple.

items.name: Ribeye
items.desc: Hand cut and grilled to your liking, served with mashed potatoes and steamed veggies.

items.name: Caribbean Shrimp Kabobs
items.desc: 2 grilled shrimp skewers with Caribbean rice, steamed veggies, and grilled pineapple.

items.name: Surf and Turf
items.desc: 12oz ribeye with your choice of grilled shrimp skewer, fried shrimp, or stuffed crab. Served with Gulf Island potatoes and steamed veggies.

items.name: Mahi Tacos
items.desc: Fresh mahi mahi wrapped in flour tortilla with homemade pico de gallo, fresh lettuce, and cheese. Served with chips and salsa.

items.name: Baja Catch
items.desc: Fresh fish prepared grilled or blackened. Served with Caribbean rice and steamed veggies.

items.name: Shrimp Scampi
items.desc: Fresh gulf shrimp sautéed in garlic wine butter. Served with Caribbean rice and steamed veggies.

items.name: Grouper Roulade
items.desc: Fresh grouper stuffed with crabmeat and broiled in garlic-wine butter cream sauce. Served with mashed potatoes and steamed veggies.

items.name: Baby Back Ribs
items.desc: Full 2 lb rack rubbed with island spices and slow cooked. Served with fries and Key West slaw.

items.name: Grouper Parmesan
items.desc: Baked grouper topped with fresh parmesan. Served with mashed potatoes and steamed veggies.

items.name: Gulf Island Ya-Ya
items.desc: Shrimp, chicken, Andouille sausage, peppers, onions, and tomatoes in garlic cheddar sauce on Caribbean rice. Served with garlic bread.

items.name: Gulf Island Catch
items.desc: Voted one of the BEST dishes on the island. Lightly pan-fried fish topped with creamy shrimp & andouille sausage sauce. Served with steamed veggies.

items.name: Coconut Shrimp
items.desc: Homemade with crispy coconut batter. Served with homemade Jezabel sauce.

items.name: Buffalo Shrimp
items.desc: Hearty portion of popcorn shrimp tossed in honey BBQ, mango BBQ, or hot sauce.

items.name: Po'Boys
items.desc: Shrimp, crawfish, or grouper served on French loaf with lettuce, tomato, and onion.

items.name: Jerk Chicken Sandwich
items.desc: Marinated chicken breast with grilled pineapple on toasted buns with lettuce, tomato, and onion.

items.name: Island Burger
items.desc: 1/2 lb burger grilled with island spices. Customize with cheese, bacon, mushrooms, or pineapple.

items.name: Fried Gulf Shrimp
items.desc: 10 golden brown shrimp served with cocktail sauce.

items.name: Fried Grouper
items.desc: Fresh and local grouper cut into thin strips. Served with tartar sauce.

items.name: Fried Chicken Tenders
items.desc: Fried, juicy chicken tenders. Served with homemade honey mustard.

items.name: Bon Secour Platter
items.desc: Fried grouper strips, crawfish tails, gulf shrimp, and stuffed crab.

items.name: Seafood Pasta
items.desc: Steamed shrimp & crawfish tails tossed in parmesan sauce with peppers and onions over penne noodles.

items.name: Chicken Alfredo
items.desc: Grilled chicken tossed in parmesan sauce with peppers and onions over penne noodles. Served with french fries and slaw.

items.name: Blackened Chicken Alfredo
items.desc: Creole-style blackened chicken tossed in parmesan sauce with peppers and onions over penne noodles.

items.name: Boiled Shrimp Dinner
items.desc: Fresh local shrimp steamed with Old Bay. Served with new potatoes, corn, lemons, drawn butter, and hushpuppy.

items.name: Snow Crab Legs
items.desc: Your choice of 1 lb or 2 lb steamed crab legs with Old Bay. Served with potatoes, corn, lemons, and drawn butter.

items.name: Peanut Butter Pie
items.desc: Creamy peanut butter pie drizzled with chocolate syrup with chocolate cracker crust.

items.name: Salted Caramel Cheesecake
items.desc: Creamy, rich cheesecake with smooth caramel and a hint of sea salt.

items.name: Key Lime Pie
items.desc: A classic made with graham cracker crust and drizzled with kiwi syrup.
